mapper.select:
SELECT SUM(IFNULL(r.sell_total_amount,0)) as totalAmount, SUM(IFNULL(r.deal_number,0)) as totalNumber, SUM(IFNULL(r.sell_total_amount,0) - IFNULL(r.buy_total_amount,0) - IFNULL(r.transport_amount,0) - IFNULL(r.warehouse_amount,0) - IFNULL(r.steve_dorage_amount,0) - IFNULL(r.delivery_fee,0) ) as grossProfit, SUM(IFNULL(r.financial_service_amount,0)) as capitalCost, SUM(IFNULL(r.after_tax_spread_amount,0)) as netMargin FROM t_ctr_contract_settlement r LEFT JOIN t_ctr_contract s ON r.sell_contract_id = s.id LEFT JOIN t_ctr_contract b ON r.buy_contract_id = b.id WHERE r.enable_flg = TRUE and s.seal_flg = TRUE and b.seal_flg = TRUE
and r.dept_id IN
#{var}
AND DATE_FORMAT(s.seal_date, '%Y-%m-%d') >= DATE_FORMAT(#{sealStartDate}, '%Y-%m-%d')
AND DATE_FORMAT(s.seal_date, '%Y-%m-%d') <= DATE_ADD(DATE_FORMAT(#{sealEndDate}, '%Y-%m-%d'),INTERVAL 1 DAY)

SELECT SUM(IFNULL(p.deal_amount,0)) operatingCosts FROM t_apply_business_pay p
p.`status` = 'D' and p.cost_type = '12'
and p.apply_user_id IN
#{var}
AND DATE_FORMAT(p.request_pay_date, '%Y-%m-%d') >= DATE_FORMAT(#{sealStartDate}, '%Y-%m-%d')
AND DATE_FORMAT(p.request_pay_date, '%Y-%m-%d') <= DATE_ADD(DATE_FORMAT(#{sealEndDate}, '%Y-%m-%d'),INTERVAL 1 DAY)
